name: Escape Over Kölen
overview: A series that details the refugee traffic from Nazi-occupied Norway to Sweden during World War II.  "The Escape Over Kölen," refers to crossing the Kölen mountain range (Scandinavian Mountains) between Sweden and Norway.

trailers.title: Flykten över Kölen del 1, En serie om flyktningetrafikken fra Norge til Sverige under 2  verdenskrig
